response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. While they have broad full-stack and embedded software experience, their work centers on web/mobile apps and open-source tooling, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Experience with low-latency systems and performance-critical DLang development
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling experience
Lacks exposure to deep learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
No background in hardware-software co-design or system-on-chip performance analysis
